app.title: YDB Installer
home.heading: Installation
home.description: One interactive installation is managed on this control host. Use the wizard to define targets and run discovery, then monitor progress.
wizard.title: Interactive installation
wizard.targets.help: Define SSH targets (hostname or IP). Use your SSH agent or keys under ~/.ssh for authentication.
wizard.discovery.hint: This connects over SSH and collects inventory (FR-DISCOVERY-003). Ensure SSH access works from the control host.
wizard.results.empty: No snapshot yet. Run discovery on the previous step.
wizard.placeholder: Later steps will be added here.
monitor.title: Installation progress
batch.title: Batch installation
